folding-homes.alt: Timber-clad folding home with a black steel frame standing on a paved concrete plinth on a level lawn, with a low boundary wall, leafy trees and a fire pit beside an outdoor table in late-afternoon light.

Grey folding home with white-framed windows, a sliding glass door and cream double entrance doors, set on a paved concrete plinth in a level suburban lawn with a low boundary wall, leafy trees and a small braai at dusk.
White flat-pack folding home with a security-barred window and steel door, standing on a paved concrete plinth in a suburban back garden at late afternoon.
Four exterior finish options for the folding tiny home shown side by side: wood-grain, light grey, white and charcoal panels, each with a white steel frame and barred window.
A folding container home shown half-folded, its hinged white wall panels opening in an X shape above the floor pan, photographed against a plain white studio background.

Collage of five real site installations of white prefabricated folding container homes, including a compact two-storey unit with a balcony and a long double-storey accommodation block with an external steel staircase.

Grey-panel folding cabin with a white door and window standing on a paved concrete plinth in a level suburban lawn, with a bistro table, low brick boundary wall and leafy trees behind in golden-hour light.
White flat-pack folding home with barred security window and steel door on a paved concrete plinth in a fenced suburban garden at golden hour
Diagram showing the X-Fold folding home in its assembled state, flat-packed for transport, and unfolding

Five-panel collage of folding home fit-out options showing the unit exterior with door and security window, a steel bunk bed, a kitchen sink cabinet, the empty insulated interior shell, and partitioned bathroom stalls with a basin.

expandable-homes.alt: Fully deployed white expandable container home with glass double-door entry on a level gravel pad in a South African mountain forest clearing at dusk, with a set outdoor dinner table and stone fire pit beside it.

Grey expandable tiny home with its roof wing folding open mid-deployment beside the glass entrance door and stairs, standing on jack legs on a gravel pad in a South African mountain forest clearing at golden hour.

Symmetrical front view of an expandable tiny home with both wings folded out and an entrance staircase, standing on a gravel-and-grass mountain forest clearing with a stone fire pit ring in the foreground.

White expandable prefab home with both wings extended and its glass sliding doors open onto grass, standing on a gravel pad in a South African mountain forest clearing at sunset, with kids' bikes by the step and an outdoor dinner table and fire pit nearby.

Living room of an expandable tiny home with a tan two-seater sofa, white coffee table and kitchen pass-through counter, its sliding glass doors opening onto a gravel-and-grass clearing with indigenous trees and a mountain ridge at sunset.
Open-plan living and dining area inside an expandable tiny home, with a cream leather sofa, coffee table, TV console, dining table, compact kitchenette and en-suite bathroom visible beyond.
Expandable home lounge interior with grey sofa, white coffee table, dining nook and kitchenette on wood-look flooring
Floor plans of three expandable tiny home layouts: an open-plan living and dining room, a one-bedroom option with bathroom, and a one-bedroom option with dining area.
Floor plan sheet showing three layout configurations of a two-bedroom expandable tiny home, each with an open-plan living area, corner shower bathroom, kitchenette and two single-bed bedrooms.
Floor plan of a four-bedroom expandable tiny home showing single beds in each room, a central corridor, and a shared bathroom with corner shower, toilet and basin.
Specification table listing the four expandable home models with exterior dimensions in millimetres and covered floor areas from 27.5 to 72 square metres.

A flat-packed expandable home module with timber-look panels and white steel framing is lowered by crane onto a gravel pad in a South African mountain forest clearing, with a stone fire pit and outdoor table nearby.
Factory-fitted bathroom pod with corner shower enclosure, toilet and wall-mounted basin in an expandable home
Ten SPC vinyl flooring plank colour options standing side by side, ranging from pale oak and honey tones through walnut and mahogany to light, medium and charcoal greys.

nature-cabins.alt: Arched-gable timber cabin with a full-height glass front and wooden deck in a misty mountain meadow at golden hour, with a small fire pit and two chairs beside it.
Two timber-clad cabins with fully glazed fronts and cream arched roof trim standing side by side in a misty indigenous forest clearing at dawn, with a footpath and fire pit between them.
White gable cabin with a full-height glass front and railed timber deck overlooking a misty golden grassland valley at sunrise.

the-dome.alt: Transparent capsule dome suite with an arched glass door glowing with warm interior light at dusk, set on a timber deck among proteas below a flat-topped mountain.
Transparent dome pod with white frame ribs and a timber-slat privacy wall on a raised wooden deck above fynbos at dusk, with its bed and green chairs visible in warm interior light.
Transparent dome suite with LED-edged ribs, glowing en-suite pod, lounge and freestanding bath on a timber deck in a fynbos clearing at dusk, mountains silhouetted behind.
Transparent barrel-vault dome suite glowing warmly at dusk on a fynbos mountain plateau, with a candlelit champagne table for two on its deck beneath the Milky Way.
Bedroom inside The Dome tiny home with a draped fabric canopy, double bed, warm bedside lamp and an arched white door to the ensuite.

White dome glamping pod with a transparent arched-glass front, open white curtains and a warmly lit bed inside, standing on a timber deck in a fynbos garden at dusk with a mountain ridge and first stars behind.
Top-down cutaway floor plan of The Dome tiny home showing a double bed, two lounge chairs with a plant table, and an en-suite bathroom inside its oval shell.

apple-cabins.alt: Long glass-walled Apple Cabin with a white shell, black-framed glazing and sage curtains, resting on a low timber deck at a pine-forest edge with two armchairs and a side table facing the garden in soft morning light.
White apple cabin office pod with a dark timber-slat end wall and full-height glass sliding doors, set on a concrete plinth with a small timber deck at a misty garden edge in soft morning light.
Apple Cabin kitchenette and work counter with walnut cabinetry, stone waterfall countertop and leather stool, lit by soft morning sun through a glass wall overlooking a garden edge.
Compact fitted bathroom inside an Apple Cabins tiny home, with marble-look wall panels, an LED-lit mirror above the vanity basin, a toilet and a glass-screened shower.
Double-storey apple cabin of two stacked white capsule pods with a railed rooftop terrace and umbrella, set on a misty forest edge with a small timber deck at ground level.
White apple cabin with a full-height glazed front wall and timber deck platform at a garden edge, morning sun breaking through the forest border behind.

glamping-capsules.alt: White glamping capsule with panoramic glass ends and a central door standing on a low timber deck in golden bushveld grass, framed by acacia trees with hazy koppies behind at late afternoon.
White capsule-style glamping pod with panoramic curved glazing, railed terrace and glass balcony on a stone plinth, overlooking golden savanna grass toward a distant rocky koppie at golden hour.

White capsule-style glamping pod with warm LED trim and panoramic glass beside a deck-edge plunge pool at dusk, set in South African bushveld with golden grass, acacia trees and rocky koppies under an orange afterglow sky.
Glamping capsule with panoramic glass walls and wooden terrace in golden bushveld with acacia trees and distant koppies
Lounge inside a glamping capsule with a tan leather sofa, armchair and ottoman, its wraparound glazing looking out over golden bushveld grass, acacia trees and distant koppies.

Two-dimensional floor plans of the glamping capsule in two sizes, the 8.5 m model (27.2 m2) and the 11.5 m model (36.8 m2), showing bedroom, bathroom, kitchenette and deck layouts with overall dimensions.
3D cutaway floor plan of a glamping capsule showing the bathroom, kitchenette, double bed, lounge chair and curved end deck.

outdoor-kitchens.alt: Open-front outdoor kitchen unit with its perforated LED canopy raised, built-in stainless steel braai and grey cabinetry, standing on a paved patio at dusk with festoon lights and a set dining table nearby
Stainless-steel outdoor kitchen with built-in green kamado grill, sink and glass-door drinks fridge on a paved patio at dusk under festoon lights

safari-tents.alt: Canvas-roofed tented suite with glass folding doors open to the bedroom, on a raised timber deck with a sundowner table and fire pit, set in golden bushveld grass with acacia trees at sunset.

Canvas safari tent suite with a scalloped olive roof on a raised timber deck at sunset, with a lantern-lit dining table and glowing fire pit bowl on the deck surrounded by golden bushveld grass and acacia trees.
Aerial view at sunset of a single canvas safari tent suite with a plunge pool and loungers on its raised wooden deck, set among golden bushveld grass and acacia trees.
Elevated canvas safari suite with a glass facade, wraparound timber deck, pergola loungers and square plunge pool overlooking a golden acacia-dotted bushveld valley at sunset.
Twin-peaked canvas safari tented suite on a timber deck glowing with lantern light at dusk, reflected in a still bushveld waterhole framed by golden grass and acacia trees.
Curved bench with striped cushions around a flickering fire pit on the timber deck of a canvas-roofed safari tented suite, with lanterns glowing and golden bushveld fading to sunset behind.

gallery.alt: White flat-pack folding tiny home with its steel door open and interior light glowing, set on a garden lawn against golden bushveld grass and sunlit mountains at dusk
Five-step process infographic — discuss, design, quote, build and delivery — arranged around a 3D render of a timber-clad tiny home with a glazed gable end and wooden deck.
Teal line-drawing icon of a nature cabin with a double-height glazed gable, long sloping roofline, side window and railed front deck.
Teal line-drawing icon of a capsule pod tiny home with panoramic windows, a central entrance module, and an attached raised deck with railing, standing on pedestal supports.
Teal line-art icon of an expandable container cabin with a fold-out side room and an angled five-panel glass wall.
Teal line-art icon of a folding tiny home shown mid-unfold, its roof and wall panels opening outward above a flat base platform with interior floor detail.
